description: This lecture proves Lemma 2, central to the FLP impossibility theorem, discussing configurations and message delivery in Byzantine fault tolerance. It explores ambiguous configurations and their implications on message delivery outcomes.
topic_summary: The lecture focuses on the proof of Lemma 2 related to the FLP impossibility theorem, detailing the definitions of configurations (zero, one, ambiguous) and their relationships in the context of message delivery and ambiguity resolution [t=0:08].
